title: activate_subscription_atomic CASE WHEN preserves max expiry across renewals correctly
description: store.rs:815-827 activate_subscription_atomic uses CASE WHEN excluded.expires_at > subscriptions.expires_at THEN excluded.expires_at ELSE subscriptions.expires_at END. This means a subscriber who pays again before their current subscription expires gets the LONGER of the two expiry dates, never a regression. A contributor might simplify to unconditional SET expires_at = excluded.expires_at, which would allow an operator to accidentally grant a shorter subscription on renewal. The CASE guard is essential and correct.
